description: Baseline matrix dimensions for the modular AI usage harness. Fixtures reference classes of documents; concrete local/prod files are supplied by the runner or QA issue.

modelGroups.name: stable-text
modelGroups.purpose: Grounded PDF QA without image input.

documents.purpose: Syllabus or short handout with dates, grading table, policies, and negative lookup cases.
Preprint or research article with sections, references, tables, and citation questions.
Visually structured PDF that stresses page markers, headings, and sparse text.
Long document for retrieval-budget and bounded-fallback behavior.
PNG/JPEG with visible text or object for vision-capable model checks.

queryTypes.purpose: Answer a specific fact that appears once.
Compare two separated sections and cite both.
Ask for something absent and verify honest not-found behavior.
Summarize a document section using retrieved evidence.
Find a title, author, citation, or quoted phrase.
Describe image content when the selected model advertises vision support.
